alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a diphenylmethane moiety, which consists of a methane wherein two hydrogen atoms are replaced by two phenyl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Diphenylmethanes

alternative_parents.description: Polycyclic compounds containing an imidazoline substituted by a phenyl group.
alternative_parents.name: Phenylimidazolidines

alternative_parents.description: Amino acids in which the amino group is attached to the carbon atom immediately adjacent to the carboxylate group (alpha carbon), or a derivative thereof.
alternative_parents.name: Alpha amino acids and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a hydantoin moiety, with exactly one substituent, which is located at the C5-position.
alternative_parents.name: 5-monosubstituted hydantoins

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an urea bearing a N-acyl group.
alternative_parents.name: N-acyl ureas

alternative_parents.description: 1,3-dipolar compounds with the general structure X:-C=Z<-> X+=C-Z- (X = C or N; Z = C, N, or O).
alternative_parents.name: Carbene-type 1,3-dipolar compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one nitrogen atom and one carbon atom linked to each other.
alternative_parents.name: Azacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a bond between carbon a pnictogen atom. Pnictogens are p-block element atoms that are in the group 15 of the periodic table.
alternative_parents.name: Organopnictogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organonitrogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a sodium ion.
alternative_parents.name: Organic sodium salts

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a carbonyl group, with the general structure RC(=O)R', where R=organyl, R'=H, N, O, organyl group or halide group.
alternative_parents.name: Carbonyl compounds

class.description: Azole derivatives obtained by conversion of both double bonds of the azole ring to single bonds, yielding a saturated ring.
class.name: Azolidines

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as phenylhydantoins. These are heterocyclic aromatic compounds containing an imiazolidinedione moiety substituted by a phenyl group.

direct_parent.description: Heterocyclic aromatic compounds containing an imiazolidinedione moiety substituted by a phenyl group.
direct_parent.name: Phenylhydantoins

intermediate_nodes.description: Organic compounds containing an imidazolidinone moiety, which is an imidazolidine ring bearing a ketone.
intermediate_nodes.name: Imidazolidinones

intermediate_nodes.description: Organic compounds containing an imidazolidinedione moiety, which is an imidazolidine ring bearing two ketones.
intermediate_nodes.name: Imidazolidinediones

intermediate_nodes.description: Heterocyclic compounds containing an imidazolidine  substituted by ketone group at positions 2 and 4.
intermediate_nodes.name: Hydantoins

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic compounds containing an imidazolidine ring, which is a saturated ring (derived from imidazole) with two nitrogen atoms at positions 1 and 3 respectively, and containing only single bonds.
subclass.name: Imidazolidines

superclass.description: Compounds containing a ring with least one carbon atom and one non-carbon atom.
superclass.name: Organoheterocyclic compounds
